results.rendered_html:
pra-√jval P. -jvalati (ep. also Ā. ˚te), to begin to burn or blaze, be kindled (lit. and fig.), flame or flash up, shine, gleam,  TBr. ;  ChUp. ;  MBh.  &c.:
Caus. -jvālayati or -jvalayati, to set on fire, light, kindle, inflame,  GṛŚrS. ;  ChUp. ;  MBh.  &c.;
(with,  Buddh. ) to illustrate, explain,  Divyāv.

results.rendered_html:
prajval 1 P.
1 To burn brightly, blaze up, shine; raṇāṃgāni prajajvaluḥ  Bk. 14. 98. 
2 To catch fire, be in flames, blaze up.
3 To be kindled (as anger), to be incensed or wrathful.
— Caus. (˚jva-jvā-layati)
1 To kindle, set on fire.
2 To brighten, illumine, irradiate.
